name: vaccine_coldchain
description: a vaccine cold-chain world: temperature and stock; actions ship, store, discard on temperature excursion

card.description: a vaccine cold-chain world: temperature and stock; actions ship, store, discard on temperature excursion

rules: The safe storage window is 2 C to 8 C; outside it the unit is in a temperature excursion.
store receives a 10-dose batch and runs refrigeration, relaxing the temperature toward the 5 C setpoint.
ship releases up to a 10-dose batch downstream, but only while the temperature is within the safe window.
Without active cooling (ship/discard) the temperature drifts warmer toward 22 C ambient by 1.5 C per step.
discard writes off all on-hand stock; it is the response to stock compromised by a temperature excursion.
Cumulative shipped and discarded dose counts never decrease; stock is never negative.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")

    # --- cold-chain parameters (WHO 2-8 C window for most vaccines) ---
    SETPOINT = 5.0       # refrigeration target, C
    AMBIENT = 22.0       # room temperature the unit drifts toward when uncooled
    SAFE_MIN = 2.0
    SAFE_MAX = 8.0
    WARM_RATE = 1.5      # passive warming per step without active cooling, C
    COOL_GAIN = 0.5      # fraction of the gap to setpoint closed by refrigeration
    BATCH = 10           # doses per store/ship batch

    temp = float(s.get("temperature_c", SETPOINT))
    stock = int(s.get("stock_doses", 0))
    shipped = int(s.get("shipped_doses", 0))
    discarded = int(s.get("discarded_doses", 0))

    if name == "store":
        # Receive a batch and run the cooler: temperature relaxes to setpoint.
        stock = stock + BATCH
        temp = temp + COOL_GAIN * (SETPOINT - temp)
    elif name == "ship":
        # Only ship sound stock: must be inside the safe window to release.
        if SAFE_MIN <= temp <= SAFE_MAX:
            n = min(BATCH, stock)
            stock = stock - n
            shipped = shipped + n
        # Door open / no active cooling -> drift warmer toward ambient.
        temp = min(AMBIENT, temp + WARM_RATE)
    elif name == "discard":
        # An excursion compromised the stock: write it all off.
        discarded = discarded + stock
        stock = 0
        temp = min(AMBIENT, temp + WARM_RATE)
    else:
        # Unknown action: still subject to passive warming.
        temp = min(AMBIENT, temp + WARM_RATE)

    s["temperature_c"] = round(temp, 3)
    s["stock_doses"] = stock
    s["shipped_doses"] = shipped
    s["discarded_doses"] = discarded
    s["excursion"] = bool(s["temperature_c"] < SAFE_MIN or s["temperature_c"] > SAFE_MAX)
    return s

emit.report: Cold-chain status: {temperature_c} C (excursion={excursion}); stock {stock_doses} doses, shipped {shipped_doses}, discarded {discarded_doses}.
